summary: Campaign Permissions feature tested successfully. Backend: All 13 API tests passed (GET/PUT campaign settings, GET permissions, POST campaign creation with permission checks). Frontend: Campaign Permissions section now visible on admin store detail page with toggle buttons for Store Managers and Sales Reps, and Save Permissions button that successfully calls the API.

issues: Initial load required expo restart for Campaign Permissions section to appear - likely caching issue. After restart, section renders correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend campaigns.py check_campaign_permission() correctly handles all roles (super_admin, org_admin, store_manager, user)
PASS: Backend admin.py GET /api/admin/stores/{store_id}/campaign-settings returns correct defaults
PASS: Backend admin.py PUT /api/admin/stores/{store_id}/campaign-settings updates settings correctly
PASS: Backend campaigns.py POST returns 403 when permission is denied
PASS: Frontend [id].tsx has Campaign Permissions section with data-testid attributes for testing
PASS: Frontend toggles update local state and Save Permissions calls API correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign Permissions feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints at /api/admin/stores/{store_id}/campaign-settings (GET/PUT) and /api/campaigns/{user_id}/permissions (GET) all working. Frontend shows Campaign Permissions section in admin store detail page with toggles for managers_can_edit and sales_can_edit. Sales rep campaign creation respects permission settings (returns 403 when disabled).

features_tested.GET_campaign_settings: PASS - Returns managers_can_edit and sales_can_edit boolean fields
features_tested.PUT_campaign_settings_enable: PASS - Updates settings correctly with persistence verified
features_tested.PUT_campaign_settings_disable: PASS - Disables settings correctly with persistence verified
features_tested.GET_permissions_invalid_user: PASS - Returns allowed=false for non-existent user
features_tested.POST_campaign_sales_enabled: PASS - Sales can create when enabled
features_tested.frontend_campaign_permissions_section: PASS - Section visible with toggles and Save button
features_tested.frontend_toggle_functionality: PASS - Toggles update state and API calls work
features_tested.frontend_save_permissions: PASS - Save button calls PUT API successfully

mocked_apis_list: Twilio SMS/MMS outbound messaging - A2P 10DLC campaign pending approval

notes.expo_restart_required: After initial testing, expo restart was required for Campaign Permissions section to appear in DOM. This may be a caching issue with hot reload.
